goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should 'arrive by 11:30'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '2 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and 'doesn't need to include internet'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '4 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
If the booking fails how about 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from birmingham new street and should arrive by 11:30
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and doesn't need to include internet
The hotel should have a star of 4
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 4 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
